title: Refactor policy admission helpers
problem: The policy admission helpers need internal extraction and cleanup so future policy rows can be wired without changing operator-visible behavior.
context: Protostar already has feature-add and cosmetic-tweak admission paths; this draft exercises the Phase 11 wired refactor policy row.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The refactor admission response reports the selected refactor policy row and its wired capability cap.
Refactor drafts can be confirmed when the refactor policy row is wired.

constraints: Keep the work inside the intent-facing policy admission surface.
Do not change execution, review repair, delivery, or Dogpile planning internals.
stopConditions: Stop if refactor admission refuses a wired policy row or if the capability cap cannot be reported deterministically.

expectedSuccessReasons: refactor policy row is wired in Phase 11
draft can be confirmed while refactor capability caps are wired
